message:
feat(tui): action progress/outcome surfaces and disabled-reason UX (br-1xt0m.1.6.3)

Add disabled state to ActionEntry with reason text and dimmed rendering.
Disabled entries show reason suffix, block Enter selection, and emit
DisabledAttempt toast. Add ActionOutcome enum (InFlight/Success/Failure)
with record_action_outcome() for feedback surfaces. Server-dispatched ops
now track InFlight status. Outcome history capped at 20 entries. 11 new
tests across action_menu and tui_app.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
